evals.prompt: Analyze this public marketing URL and turn its visual system into a systematic prompt and reusable Codex Skill. Do not copy its branding or source text.
evals.expected_output: A validated StyleSpec, 15-section systematic prompt, evidence report, tokens, and generated style Skill with URL facts separated from inference.

evals.prompt: I only have one desktop screenshot. Extract the UI style for Claude Code, but be honest about what cannot be known from the image.
evals.expected_output: An image-evidence package whose typography family, DOM, breakpoints, hidden states, and motion remain explicit unknowns.

evals.prompt: Turn this editorial poster into a reusable web-app visual style. Keep the mood and composition principles, not the poster artwork or copy.
evals.expected_output: Translated visual principles and UI tokens marked as translated, plus rights-safe negative constraints and acceptance targets.
